## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sunbit exploring AI-focused messaging/positioning strategy; may lead to AI basics content creation](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [B2B content research completed; 3 initial articles from different clusters to be reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Content performance showing positive trends; weekly/monthly reporting views to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [10 additional B2B-focused blog posts planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

## Topics

### AI-Focused Content Strategy

  - [Sunbit, powered by AI, considering stronger AI positioning in messaging](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Exploring strategy similar to Upstart (AI lending company)](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Potential content focus: AI basics, machine learning, LLMs for financial services](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Aims to position Sunbit as an AI leader while navigating regulatory concerns](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### B2B Content Development

  - [Research completed with B2B/B2C tabs in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Initial approach: 3 articles from different clusters for review](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Plan to expand volume based on feedback (20-40 articles potential)](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [B2B demand gen team to review; may require more selective approach](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Positive growth trends: daily clicks increasing (now \~10/day)](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Impressions spiking after publishing](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Plans to update reporting: shift from daily to weekly/monthly views](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Minor dip in performance (possibly due to Memorial Day) being monitored](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

### Ongoing Content Production

  - [10 additional B2B-focused blog posts planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Recent blogs with legal for approval; expected publication by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

  - [Jason to review and share B2B content topics with demand gen team](https://fathom.video/share/f-hLScK9Rg5upUWrdzCJeSE19zonN8ap?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
